# Security Best Practices

> Proven patterns for tenant data isolation, time-bound access, and audit trails in multi-tenant SaaS.

## Entries

- [Customer-Controlled Support Access for Multi-Tenant SaaS](customer-controlled-support-access.md): Platform staff have zero default access to tenant data. Tenant admins issue time-bound, scope-bounded grants. Standard, break-glass, and Legal Hold workflows. SOC 2 + GDPR aligned. FOUNDATIONAL.
